_comment: Maintenance data for the phase-2 transform (transform_report_data.py).
Edit this file - not the code - when business rules change:
special_category: classification rules from the legacy Power Query
step (spec section 3.9). rental_accounts match on the account_id
display name; the product-id lists match on the numeric variant id.
PRM B.V. (id 2) is included here, fixing the gap in the legacy
3.2); the factor is how many of that unit make one reference unit
(g=1000, ton=0.001 relative to kg). The transform warns about any
uom id it meets that is missing here (quantity is then kept
Deliberately missing: id 39 'boxes' - the units-per-box factor
must be copied from the dim_uom query in the legacy workbook
(Power Query editor); until then its warning is intentional.
Ids 5/10/14/40 were added 2026-07-06 with natural factors after
they surfaced in the first live run - cross-check them against
the workbook's dim_uom query when it is open anyway.
